title: Signature Series Launch Party Week
excerpt: Hello! I am excited to be celebrating the release of my new Signature Series book ! Northridge Publishing will be announcing all the details on the Signature Series Facebook page each day. There are some awesome prize packs up for…
body: Hello! I am excited to be celebrating the release of my new Signature Series book! Northridge Publishing will be announcing all the details on the Signature Series Facebook page each day. There are some awesome prize packs up for grabs from my favorite companies like American Crafts, Fiskars, jillibean soup, and more!
